entries.content: Codex在Windows上写文件的正确方式已确认。根治方案：用@''@(单引号PowerShell here-string)代替@" \@(双引号)，通过Set-Content写临时.cjs文件，再node执行。关键原因是双引号here-string会把反引号当作转义符吃掉，单引号则原样保留。这个解决方案已写入CODEX_WINDOWS_WRITE.md供Codex参考。 --drawer 技术/环境配置
entries.originalContent: Codex在Windows上写文件的正确方式已确认。根治方案：用@''@(单引号PowerShell here-string)代替@" \@(双引号)，通过Set-Content写临时.cjs文件，再node执行。关键原因是双引号here-string会把反引号当作转义符吃掉，单引号则原样保留。这个解决方案已写入CODEX_WINDOWS_WRITE.md供Codex参考。 --drawer 技术/环境配置

entries.content: 2026-06-18: Investigated OpenClaw gateway isolated cron jobs aborting around 369s despite timeoutSeconds 600/30. Cause is diagnostics stuckSessionAbortMs no-progress abort-drain threshold defaulting around ~6 minutes. Added diagnostics.stuckSessionAbortMs=900000 to C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\openclaw.json and validated with openclaw config validate --json. Note: openclaw config patch --stdin was rejected by size-drop safety, so used minimal apply_patch. --drawer OpenClaw 运维
